svg.title: Hacker News Sentiment Analysis Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from Hacker News API through Python scraper, sentiment analysis, PostgreSQL, and AWS S3 to Streamlit dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Hacker News API work?')

g.text: Fetch top, new, best, ask, show

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does VADER sentiment analysis work?')
sendPrompt('How does TextBlob sentiment analysis work?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('How is data organised in the S3 bucket?')
sendPrompt('What charts does the Streamlit dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What does the user see on the dashboard?')
